'''dhagozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyanosiphovirus|cyanosiphovirus]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-g-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyanosiphovirus|cyanosiphovirus]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhagozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhægezheth|dhægezheth]] || [[word:dhægezhej|dhægezhej]] || [[word:dhægezhesh|dhægezhesh]] || [[word:dhægezhe|dhægezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhagogozhoth|dhagogozhoth]] || [[word:dhagogozhoj|dhagogozhoj]] || [[word:dhagogozhosh|dhagogozhosh]] || [[word:dhagogozho|dhagogozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhagozhoth|dhagozhoth]] || [[word:dhagozhoj|dhagozhoj]] || [[word:dhagozhosh|dhagozhosh]] || [[word:dhagozho|dhagozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhagofzhoth|dhagofzhoth]] || [[word:dhagofzhoj|dhagofzhoj]] || [[word:dhagofzhosh|dhagofzhosh]] || [[word:dhagofzhof|dhagofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhagozhotho|dhagozhotho]] || [[word:dhagozhojo|dhagozhojo]] || [[word:dhagozhosho|dhagozhosho]] || [[word:dhagozhoko|dhagozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhagozhoth|dhagozhoth]] || [[word:dhagozhoj|dhagozhoj]] || [[word:dhagozhosh|dhagozhosh]] || [[word:dhagozho|dhagozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhagozhothol|dhagozhothol]] || [[word:dhagozhojol|dhagozhojol]] || [[word:dhagozhoshol|dhagozhoshol]] || [[word:dhagozhokol|dhagozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhagozhothotho|dhagozhothotho]] || [[word:dhagozhojojo|dhagozhojojo]] || [[word:dhagozhoshosho|dhagozhoshosho]] || [[word:dhagozhoko|dhagozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhagozhothon|dhagozhothon]] || [[word:dhagozhojon|dhagozhojon]] || [[word:dhagozhoshon|dhagozhoshon]] || [[word:dhagozhokon|dhagozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhagozhothoro|dhagozhothoro]] || [[word:dhagozhojoro|dhagozhojoro]] || [[word:dhagozhoshoro|dhagozhoshoro]] || [[word:dhagozhokoro|dhagozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
